actionable_findings.summary: Wave70 Items/Tracker CSVs and package manifests report 166 rows, but Wave70 coverage reports still report 178 rows.
actionable_findings.recommended_action: Refresh only the Wave70 coverage reports or mark them historical; do not run Wave65 for this mismatch.

actionable_findings.summary: Plan/PROJECT_MANIFEST.json top-level wave_current=25/latest_wave=34 is legacy relative to active Waves64/65/70 steering.
actionable_findings.recommended_action: During deliberate manifest maintenance, mark the top-level fields historical or add explicit current_operational_waves metadata.

non_findings: Active steering points to Wave70 canonical-reference/terminal prerequisite gap, not stale completed blockers.
Waves71-76 remain deferred with Deferred_Required_Not_Complete rows and deferred scope language.
Wave65 policy remains scoped to Plan file additions/renames; Wave65 was not run.
Strict whole-artifact visual/audio QA rules and EC2 cost-control rules remain present.
